articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Album: Star-studded artist lineup revealed
articles.description: FIFA unveils the star-studded 18-track Official FIFA World Cup 2026 Album. The lineup features global stars like LISA, Shakira, Anitta, and Future, blending K-pop, Afrobeats, Latin music, and pop. The album is set for release on June 5.

articles.title: Pune Fergusson College graduate quit his job at KPMG to pursue acting, got rejected by FTII twice. Now, the Tamil actor has worked with Mammootty, Tovino Thomas, Parvathy Thiruvothu
articles.description: Arjun Radhakrishnan, once a KPMG employee, bravely left his corporate career to pursue acting. Facing rejections from FTII twice, his persistence paid off with a breakthrough in Rocket Boys. Read on to know more about the actor's journey and what led him to quit his job.

articles.title: These Chatpata Mango Pops Are Sweet, Spicy And Seriously Addictive
articles.description: This easy mango pops recipe brings together sweet, tangy and spicy flavours in a unique way. Perfect for summer days, it is a refreshing treat you can make at home.

articles.title: What is gulab jamun called in English? Here’s interesting facts about India's favourite sweet
articles.description: Gulab Jamun in English: Gulab Jamun is widely regarded as one of India's most iconic sweets. It is served during festivals, weddings, religious celebrations and family gatherings.

articles.title: Blast box office collection day 7: Arjun Sarja’s action drama continues to have great run, inches closer to Rs 35 crore worldwide
articles.description: Arjun Sarja’s comeback action entertainer Blast is maintaining a steady run at the box office, even as it records its first noticeable dip during the weekdays.

articles.title: Cocktail 2: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna Film Recovers 50 Per Cent Budget Before Release - Report
articles.description: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna's Cocktail 2 is all set to release on May 19. It has reportedly recovered 50 per cent of the budget. Homi Adajania has directed the rom-com.

articles.title: Enrique Iglesias SLAMMED for reposting video of kiss with fan; sparks split rumours with Anna Kournikova
articles.description: Enrique Iglesias sparked online debate by sharing an old concert video of him kissing a fan to promote upcoming shows. While the singer has a history of embracing fans, some followers questioned his judgment and its potential impact on his long-term relationship with Anna Kournikova. Iglesias previously addressed fan interactions, stating his partner is generally accepting.

articles.title: From Aamir Khan to Shah Rukh Khan: Ankur Warikoo reveals the Bollywood characters that taught him life lessons beyond the movies
articles.description: Entrepreneur Ankur Warikoo identified three Bollywood characters offering valuable life lessons. Rancho from '3 Idiots' teaches the importance of curiosity-driven learning over rankings. Arjun from 'Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara' highlights that success without fulfillment can be a trap. Dr. Jehangir Khan from 'Dear Zindagi' emphasizes self-discovery through reflection rather than direct instruction.

articles.title: Swaroop Khan shuts down death hoax after Google mistakenly lists him as dead: ‘Abhi hum zinda hain’
articles.description: Rajasthani folk singer Swaroop Khan has clarified that he is alive after a false death listing on Google sparked confusion among fans. The singer shared a screenshot of the erroneous information and responded with humour, assuring well-wishers that he is safe and healthy.

articles.title: How Taylor Swift built a $2 billion fortune through music alone
articles.description: Taylor Swift has achieved a staggering $2 billion net worth, becoming the richest musician solely through her music and performances. Her record-breaking Eras Tour, a concert film, and a prolific music catalogue, including successful re-recordings, have propelled her to this historic financial milestone. Swift's astute business decisions and generous philanthropy further underscore her remarkable success.

articles.title: Who killed Andie Bell? A Good Girl's Guide to Murder Season 1 explained amid Season 2 Netflix release
articles.description: The unexpected revelation pertaining to Andie Bell in A Good Girl's Guide to Murder finale surprised both viewers and the cast.

articles.title: Ravi Kishan shares his experience working with Madhuri Dixit: 'Never seen her throw any tantrums'
articles.description: Ravi Kishan paints an enchanting picture of his collaboration with the iconic Madhuri Dixit on 'Maa Behen'. Within the whirlwind of enthusiastic crowds and demanding shoot conditions, Madhuri's graceful poise was nothing short of mesmerizing. Kishan expresses his admiration for her ability to maintain an inner peace, making her shine even brighter amid the chaos. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: Anupam Kher 'Scolded' David Dhawan For Planning To Retire After Varun's HJTIHH: 'Who Are You To Decide?'
articles.description: Anupam Kher said that David Dhawan is his best friend, and that as long as fans love him, he shouldn't retire.

articles.title: Shakira opens up about her lifelong love for soccer as she prepares to make World Cup halftime show history along with Madonna and BTS
articles.description: Shakira returns as the face of the 2026 FIFA World Cup with "Dai Dai," a collaboration with Burna Boy that blends Afrobeats and reggaetón, with all proceeds going to children's education through the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund. She will also co-headline the first-ever World Cup final halftime show at MetLife Stadium alongside Madonna and BTS on July 19 — marking her second official World Cup anthem, 16 years after "Waka Waka."

articles.title: 'Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2' 3rd June written update: Rio and Niyati return to Shantiniketan with a secret revenge plan
articles.description: Niyati and her son Rio return to Shantiniketan, with Tulsi orchestrating a grand welcome despite initial resistance. Rio, seeking revenge for his father, vows to support his mother's return. Meanwhile, Hemant is shocked by Rio's arrival, recognizing him as Ansh's son. A roadside incident involving Vaishnavi adds to the unfolding drama.

articles.title: John Rambo prequel begins filming in Thailand as Noah Centineo takes over iconic role, set for 2024 release
articles.description: Lionsgate announces the prequel John Rambo, set to release on June 4, 2024, with filming underway in Thailand across various locations.

articles.title: John Rambo prequel begins filming in Thailand as Noah Centineo takes over iconic role, set for 2027 release
articles.description: Lionsgate announces the prequel John Rambo, set to release in 2027 with filming underway in Thailand across various locations.

articles.title: Energy, water use and pollution of AI and data centers rival most countries
articles.description: The environmental footprint of data centers already rivals some of the world's largest countries, according to a United Nations University report, which also predicts their water and energy use and pollution will double in just four years as use of artificial intelligence grows.

articles.title: Maria Sharapova and Alexander Gilkes combined net worth in 2026: Inside their massive fortune, investments and luxury lifestyle
articles.description: Maria Sharapova and Alexander Gilkes have an estimated combined net worth of more than $240 million in 2026. Sharapova built most of her fortune through tennis, endorsements, Sugarpova, and investments, while Gilkes earned wealth through art and business ventures. Together, they have created a powerful financial portfolio while balancing family life and successful careers beyond sports.

articles.title: Fired '60 Minutes' Star Scott Pelley Accuses CBS Of Pushing 'Falsehoods' & Political Bias
articles.description: Former '60 Minutes' star Scott Pelley has launched an extraordinary attack on CBS News after being fired, accusing network leadership of pressuring journalists to include "falsehoods" and political bias in reporting. Pelley also claimed politicians were allowed to influence interview selections and warned that '60 Minutes' has lost its identity amid a wave of high-profile departures.

articles.title: Hina Khan calls out Shilpa Shinde’s false se*ual harassment allegation as ‘absolutely shameful’; says Bhabi Ji producer is the ‘real victim’
articles.description: Actress Hina Khan has voiced her strong disapproval of Shilpa Shinde's recent confession about falsely accusing producer Sanjay Kohli of sexual harassment. Khan described the revelation as 'utterly disgraceful,' emphasizing the significant repercussions it could have for real victims and Kohli's loved ones.

articles.description: Varun Dhawan has found himself at the centre of online criticism after a video from his temple visit went viral, triggering strong reactions from users who questioned his choice of attire.

articles.title: Saif Ali Khan allegedly sent heartfelt note to fan page: 'I'm not on Instagram, but your support means a lot'
articles.description: Saif Ali Khan has reportedly sent a heartfelt note to a fan page, thanking supporters for their love and dedication despite not being on social media. The actor also hinted at sharing exclusive content and interacting with fans through occasional interviews.

articles.title: Akshay Kumar's birthday wish for 'Welcome To The Jungle' director
articles.description: Akshay Kumar wished 'Welcome To The Jungle' director Ahmed Khan on his birthday, praising his work. Kumar said nobody else could have pulled off the film's madness. The teaser for the third 'Welcome' movie has been released to the public.

articles.description: Tanishaa Mukerji revealed that sister Kajol paid for her Mumbai home during a house tour with Farah Khan.

articles.title: Cassie Ventura leaves US following a legal showdown
articles.description: Cassie Ventura has reportedly left the United States and has no plans to return, according to a legal declaration. This comes after she received $30 million in compensation from a lawsuit filed against Sean 'Diddy' Combs in 2023. The article also details a separate lawsuit filed against Ventura by a male escort.

articles.title: Pankaj Bhadouria shares health update after cancer surgery, urges women to get screened
articles.description: Celebrity chef Pankaj Bhadouria has successfully undergone breast cancer surgery and is now on the road to recovery.

articles.title: Ritwik Ghatak's restored classics to reach global audience through London retrospective
articles.description: Film restoration: NFDC-NFAI has restored all eight Ritwik Ghatak feature films in 4K and partnered with the British Film Institute for a London retrospective. The showcase marks his birth centenary and highlights India's film heritage efforts.

articles.title: Shefali Shah and Fardeen Khan to share screen space for the first time in Ektaa Kapoor’s period drama 'Koke'
articles.description: Shefali Shah is set to lead Netflix's upcoming period drama 'Koke', marking her first on-screen pairing with Fardeen Khan. Backed by Ektaa Kapoor's Balaji Telefilms and directed by Nupur Asthana, the large-scale series is currently in production. With an anticipated early 2027 release, 'Koke' promises to be a significant addition to Netflix's Indian content slate.

articles.title: What is chole bhature called in english? Here’s interesting facts about India’s favorite breakfast
articles.description: Over the decades, the dish spread across the country and became especially popular in Delhi, where it evolved into a breakfast staple after Partition. Today, it is one of India's most recognizable street foods.

articles.title: Obsession director Curry Baker, Backrooms director Kane Parsons, How Gen Z directors are changing filmmaking in Hollywood
articles.description: YouTube-trained creators like Markiplier, Curry Barker and Kane Parsons are breaking into Hollywood through horror films, proving online platforms can shape new filmmakers while keeping cinema relevant for younger audiences.

articles.title: Jana Nayagan to miss June 18 release? CBFC and distribution issues put Vijay's film on hold indefinitely
articles.description: Vijay’s highly anticipated film Jana Nayagan is reportedly facing an indefinite delay despite earlier speculation of a June 18 release. Reports suggest certification and distribution issues have stalled the project, leaving fans disappointed.

articles.title: Apple reveals 2026 Design Award Winners, spotlighting innovation and accessibility
articles.description: Apple's 2026 Design Awards celebrated 12 apps and games across six categories, highlighting a strong focus on accessibility and innovation. Winners showcased advancements in spatial computing with Vision Pro, alongside elegantly simple utility apps and narrative-driven games, reflecting current trends in software development.

articles.title: Triptii Dimri on working with Madhuri Dixit in Netflix's 'Maa Behen': 'Even if I become a star of her stature...'
articles.description: Madhuri Dixit, when asked about how she would like her admirers to remember her after decades of winning hearts, said, "I want people to remember me by how I made them feel."

articles.title: Javier Bardem Opens Up About Playing Legendary Villain Max Cady In 'Cape Fear' Series I N18G
articles.description: Javier Bardem steps into the iconic role of Max Cady in Apple TV+'s highly anticipated adaptation of the 1991 film 'Cape Fear'. Speaking at the premiere, Bardem revealed how he drew inspiration from Robert De Niro and Robert Mitchum while adding humour and irony to the legendary villain. Co-stars Amy Adams and Patrick Wilson also discussed the show's timely themes of justice, truth, surveillance, and media manipulation. Watch the cast break down the gripping new thriller ahead of its June 5 premiere.
